title: LegoBricks RoundStuds
description: Replaces normal blocks with LEGO bricks.
body:
Replaces normal blocks to LEGO bricks. <s>Caution: this may hurt your feet.</s>

This version contains round studs compared to the original pack.

Compatible with most resource packs! Leaves textures unchanged, only changes models.

Made for Minecraft 1.16.x but may also compatible with other versions above 1.13.

Works well with [BlueBlocksMC](https://github.com/Blue-Beaker/BlueBlocksMC) resource pack.

 

将普通方块替换为乐高积木块。<s>警告：可能会伤到脚。</s>

与之前的版本相比，此版本的钉是圆的。

与大多数资源包兼容! 不修改材质，只修改模型。

用于Minecraft1.16.x，可能也兼容1.13以上的其他版本。
